edge: SMO iteration is costly due to observation noise
observation noise is reduced by averaging over many quantum measurement shots
SubsCoRe is an adaptive cost control method for SMO
SubsCoRe uses a Gaussian process surrogate
GP surrogate requires low uncertainty over the subspace being updated
adaptive cost control sets required accuracy according to optimization progress
required accuracy determines the minimum number of measurement shots
SubsCoRe significantly improves the efficiency of SMO
